# Yasir Khan

> Yasir Khan builds complete websites for small businesses — branding, design, development, hosting, SEO setup, and post-launch support handled by one person.

Yasir Khan provides end-to-end web design and development services. The focus is on creating modern, fast-loading, and credible websites that help small businesses generate leads and establish a professional online presence.

## Contact

- [Email](mailto:itsyasirkhan.dev@gmail.com): Direct email contact
- [WhatsApp](https://wa.me/923014545482): Quick messages and inquiries
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/connectyasir): Professional profile and connections
- [Book a Call](https://cal.com/connectyasir/30min): Schedule a free 30-minute consultation

## Services

- [Web Design & Development](https://yasir.qzz.io/services): End-to-end website creation from branding to launch
- [Website Redesign](https://yasir.qzz.io/services): Modernizing outdated, slow, or confusing websites
- [Lead Generation Platforms](https://yasir.qzz.io/services): Custom platforms with admin dashboards and automated capture

## Key Information

- [Home](https://yasir.qzz.io/): Main overview of services and value proposition
- [About](https://yasir.qzz.io/about): Information about Yasir Khan's background and expertise
- [Portfolio & Projects](https://yasir.qzz.io/projects): Case studies of past work

## Core Projects

- [Apna Qarz Case Study](https://yasir.qzz.io/projects/apna-qarz): A custom finance advisory platform that generated 1,000+ leads in its first month

## What We Do Not Do

- We do not offer cheap, generic template-based websites that sacrifice quality and performance.
- We do not provide standalone SEO or marketing services without managing the website structure.
